## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, AI search optimization, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is improving, with "things to do in month" articles performing well across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [AI search optimization requires a focus on informational content, local insights, and rich media (images/videos)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [ROI tracking for blog content is challenging but important; team to develop better reporting methods](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [New content ideas discussed: tour-specific articles, local restaurant guides, and data-driven infographics](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Review

  - [Cancun showing growth in impressions and clicks for GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - ["Things to do in month" articles performing well across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Nightlife content for Cancun showing good traction with room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Vallarta seeing success with "Is it safe?" article, driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### ROI Tracking and Reporting

  - [Current challenge: attributing revenue directly to blog content](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Approximately $50,000 in revenue linked to articles since January (vs. $54,000 in agency fees)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Team to develop more comprehensive reporting method, including:](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [Dividing organic traffic between main pages, tours, and blog](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Tracking first-click vs. last-click attribution](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [Cumulative revenue tracking from the start of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### AI Search Optimization

  - [AI overviews (e.g., from Gemini) becoming more accurate and comprehensive](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Only 5% of AI overviews contain exact search queries, suggesting need for broader keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Transactional searches still primarily happening on traditional Google search](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Adventures Group showing well in AI results for tour-specific queries, less so for general travel tips](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

### Content Strategy Improvements

  - [Leverage Instagram content (videos, images) in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [Create more tour-specific content (e.g., packing lists, experience descriptions)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Develop local insight articles (e.g., best dishes according to locals, restaurant guides)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [Use data to create engaging infographics about tour popularity and traveler preferences](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Implement schema markup to enhance search visibility (to be discussed with technical SEO consultant)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [Team working on refreshing existing content (e.g., Things to do in Tulum)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [8 new articles planned for completion by end of week 15](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)
  - [Initiative to generate original photos and content for destinations (e.g., malecon in Puerto Vallarta, murals)](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=3231.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with technical SEO consultant to discuss schema markup and other technical improvements](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive ROI reporting method for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Plan photoshoots in destinations to gather original visual content](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=3231.0)
  - [Create new content focusing on tour-specific information and local insights](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Implement Instagram content into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [Explore creation of data-driven infographics about tour popularity and traveler preferences](https://fathom.video/share/LLKzRwoWPKmg6bfhqykLz4ynqcp1fvsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
